productDisplayName: Ed Hardy Men's Beautiful But Dangerous Black T-shirt
description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with ribbed neckline, graphic on the front and smaller graphic on the back neckFittingRegularWash care Machine wash in cold water with like colors Do not bleach Tumble dry on low Do not iron on embellishments Indulge in fantasies of faraway mysterious lands with this black tee from ed hardy.
